releaseNotes:
_Date: 2026-04-02_

---

### ✨ What's New in v1.0.3

#### 🔗 Custom Marketplace Sources
You can now **add your own GitHub or Azure DevOps repositories** as Marketplace sources — perfect for private skill libraries or team-shared plugins. Personal Access Tokens are stored securely in your OS keychain, and custom sources appear alongside built-in ones in a clean, dedicated section in Marketplace Settings.

#### 🗂 Smarter Sidebar Navigation
Workspace sections in the sidebar now behave like proper accordions — **only one section expands at a time**, keeping the view tidy and focused as you switch between workspaces.

---

### 🛠 Improvements

- **Cleaner Scheduler UI** — the manual refresh button and scheduler toggle have been removed from the interface for a less cluttered experience; scheduling continues to work automatically in the background.
- **Always accurate version number** — the app version shown in settings is now read directly from the package, so it's always in sync with what you actually installed.

---

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed an issue where the app could lose track of its **device identity** across sessions, causing unexpected disconnections or re-authentication prompts.

---

_Co-authored by [Nova](https://www.compassap.ai/portfolio/nova.html)_
